description: Add task status tracking with update controls and filtering.

userStories.title: Add task status persistence with pending default
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want each task to store a status defaulting to pending so that existing and new tasks have a consistent lifecycle state.
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks table has status column with allowed values pending, in_progress, and done
Existing task records backfill to pending
New tasks default to pending when status is omitted
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Define shared task status type for server and UI
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a shared TaskStatus type so that status handling remains consistent across API responses and UI components.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared TaskStatus type is exported with values pending, in_progress, and done
Task DTO and API schema use shared TaskStatus type
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add backend action to update task status
userStories.description: As a user, I want task status updates to be saved from task list interactions so that task progress persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Server exposes task status update action or endpoint accepting pending, in_progress, and done
Invalid status values are rejected with validation error
Successful updates persist in database and return updated task payload
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show task status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task card to show current status badge so that I can quickly scan work state.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards render status badge for pending, in_progress, and done
Badge label updates after saved status changes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control on task list rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change task status directly from task list rows so that updating progress is fast.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task row includes status dropdown with pending, in_progress, and done options
Changing selection triggers backend status update and keeps row in sync with server response
Update errors show inline feedback without page reload
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter task list by status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter task list by status so that I can focus on pending, in-progress, or completed work.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list includes status filter options All, Pending, In Progress, and Done
Selecting filter shows only matching tasks while preserving task ordering rules
Filter state can be reset to All
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
